scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w backend"
scripts.tunnel: concurrently "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w backend" "cloudflared tunnel --url http://localhost:5177"
scripts.share: concurrently "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w backend" "npx -y localtunnel --port 5177"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install -w frontend && npm install -w backend
